title: yapp.page, Drop a page. Get a link.
excerpt: Turn any HTML file, PDF, or ZIP into a live shareable link in seconds. Free, no signup.
content_html:
M

Recommended

Publish with AI

Connect Claude or ChatGPT once, no install, no API key. Then ask: "Build me a landing page and publish it." It builds, deploys, returns the URL. Prefer HTTP? Use the REST API.

$ claude mcp add --transport http yapp https://yapp.page/mcp

↑

No account

Upload an HTML file

Drag a file, a ZIP, a PDF, or a whole folder. We give you back a shareable URL and a 30-day route.

Checking session…

Drop files or a folder

0 characters Doesn't look like HTML, paste the full code block.

Pick a name or leave blank, we'll generate one.

Edit from another device

Open this link in any browser to edit the page. Anyone with the link can edit, so keep it private.

30-day default · no signup
